creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
I've been using the LLVM_PORT option for a while with no problems until now.  Saves a healthy chunk of time and space.

I tested with attachment 187613 - firefox compiles now, and I've had no problems yet.  The patch is pretty simple (just adds some accessors) and seems like it could be acceptable upstream.  I wonder if the rust-lang folks have already submitted the change.

I have not analyzed what else is different between rust-llvm and normal llvm.  That would be good information.
